title: Emerald On A Stick
description: Adds an emerald on a stick, holding it makes villagers follow you. craftable with an emerald and a fishing rod
body:
Adds a Emerald on a Stick! A tool that makes villagers follow you if you hold it!


![Emerald on a stick](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a7443b7c5706f0a88cf951267e60766425e47b89_0.webp)


Craftable with a fishing rod and an emerald.

![recipe for emerald on a stick](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9a4146cefa52f4ddf54744e4b02e68e2776e6774.png)




Join the [Discord!](https://discord.gg/p6ShJPq98d) You can ask for help, a mod, just suggest something, hangout or request the source code of any mod I have made (if I still have the source code)

Or donate to my [Kofi](https://ko-fi.com/bikerboys) incase you are feeling generous!
